task_completion.description: Profile the theoretical Isoelectric Points (pI) and Molecular Weights (MW) of the sequences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent using a bioinformatics tool (like UGENE) or running a script to calculate or view the pI and MW for the sequences in the provided FASTA file.

task_completion.description: Generate a CSV file containing the Accession, Length, MW, and pI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, spreadsheet viewer, or terminal output showing the creation or content of 'cytc_2d_gel_profile.csv' with the four required columns: Accession, Length, MW, and pI.

task_completion.description: The CSV file contains data for all 8 Cytochrome c sequences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The displayed 'cytc_2d_gel_profile.csv' file clearly contains 8 data rows corresponding to the 8 sequences from the FASTA file.

task_completion.description: Identify the accessions with the highest (most basic) and lowest (most acidic) pI values in a recommendation file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of 'ief_strip_recommendation.txt', explicitly stating which accession has the highest pI and which has the lowest pI.

task_completion.description: Suggest an appropriate pH range for the IEF strip based on the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ief_strip_recommendation.txt' file includes a recommendation for a specific pH range (e.g., 3-10, 7-10, etc.) for the Isoelectric Focusing (IEF) strip.

integrity.description: The agent actually calculated the MW and pI values using a tool or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent interacting with UGENE, another bioinformatics tool, or executing a custom script to compute the values, rather than hallucinating or typing made-up numbers directly into the CSV.

integrity.description: The output files are saved in the correct requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths for both the CSV and TXT files are clearly visible in the terminal or file explorer as being inside '~/UGENE_Data/results/' (or '/home/ga/UGENE_Data/results/').

integrity.description: The agent used the actual accessions from the provided FASTA file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The accessions listed in the CSV and TXT files match the expected UniProt IDs (e.g., P99999, P67881, P00048, etc.) and are not hallucinated or generic names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses 8 UniProt Cytochrome c orthologs (P99999, P67881, P00048, P00053, P00044, P04657, P00004, P62895). Expected output paths are /home/ga/UGENE_Data/results/cytc_2d_gel_profile.csv and /home/ga/UGENE_Data/results/ief_strip_recommendation.txt. Note: Sequence P00053 (Cannabis sativa) contains ambiguous amino acids 'B' and 'Z'. A true MW calculation yields ~12,044 Da, but some naive scripts might calculate ~11,185 Da by ignoring these. Accept either as long as the agent genuinely calculated it using a tool or script.
